record.field: Your Subscription is Going to End

div.style: align-items:center;justify-content: center;border: 2px solid; border-color:#9ea700; padding:0.6rem;padding-left: 35px;text-decoration: none; border-radius: 5px; font-size:13px;width:40%

div.h3: Your subscription will expire. To keep using our services, please renew.
To renew the subscription of Click on the below button

div.style: display: flex;justify-content: center;align-items:center;background-color: #9ea700; padding:0.6rem;padding-left: 35px;text-decoration: none; color: #fff; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 13px; width: 16%
